## How you tested

## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -w .` is clean
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go build ./...` succeeds (for release changes)
- [ ] README/ADDING_A_TOOL docs updated if user-facing
- [ ] PR is small and focused (one change)
- [ ] Issue is linked with `Closes #123` if it exists
